19.kj: be (make) afraid, be careful, discomfit, fray (away), quake, tremble.

20.gl: an eye (literally or figuratively); by analogy, a fountain (as the eye of the landscape)
20.kj: affliction, outward appearance, [phrase] before, [phrase] think best, colour, conceit, [phrase] be content, countenance, [phrase] displease, eye((-brow), (-d), -sight), face, [phra

20.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
20.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

20.gl: to end, whether intransitive (to cease, be finished, perish) or transitived (to complete, prepare, consume)
20.kj: accomplish, cease, consume (away), determine, destroy (utterly), be (when... were) done, (be an) end (of), expire, (cause to) fail, faint, finish, fulfil, [idiom] fully, [idiom] ha

20.gl: properly, to wander away, i.e. lose oneself; by implication to perish (causative, destroy)
20.kj: break, destroy(-uction), [phrase] not escape, fail, lose, (cause to, make) perish, spend, [idiom] and surely, take, be undone, [idiom] utterly, be void of, have no way to flee.

20.gl: literally a cord (as an attachment); figuratively, expectancy
20.kj: expectation(-ted), hope, live, thing that I long for.

20.gl: morally wrong; concretely, an (actively) bad person
20.kj: [phrase] condemned, guilty, ungodly, wicked (man), that did wrong.
